subject: test(tripwire): guard root ErrorBoundary against inline-style regression
body:
Adds a 64th tripwire assertion that catches re-introduction of
inline `style={{ minHeight }}` in main.jsx's root ErrorBoundary
fallback. The inline styles were removed in commit aea7c43
(converted to Tailwind utilities) with the rationale that the
browser's user-agent default stylesheet renders the fallback
legibly even when the CSS bundle fails to load.

The test checks both the positive (Tailwind utilities present) and
the negative (inline `style={{ minHeight }}` absent) so a future
contributor who re-adds the inline styles for "resilience" sees the
test fail with a clear message pointing to the CLAUDE.md rationale.

Test count: 63 → 64. Build unaffected.

Tags: testing, tripwire, regression-guard
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: post-audit-cleanup
Semver: patch
